records.m_Talk_ENG: Asha!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asha!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asha!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare an impurity... reject our grace?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare an impurity... reject our grace?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare an impurity... reject our grace?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asha! Are you all right? ASHA!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asha! Are you all right? ASHA!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asha! Are you all right? ASHA!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right? Can you recognize me?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right? Can you recognize me?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right? Can you recognize me?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You really did know my name... Haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You really did know my name... Haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You really did know my name... Haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened...? I thought I was in Gronia...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened...? I thought I was in Gronia...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened...? I thought I was in Gronia...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have imitated everything about Ravi!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have imitated everything about Ravi!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have imitated everything about Ravi!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I even extrapolated your past, reconstructed your childhood, and even showed you what you wanted to see!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I even extrapolated your past, reconstructed your childhood, and even showed you what you wanted to see!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I even extrapolated your past, reconstructed your childhood, and even showed you what you wanted to see!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even going as far as granting you your trivial wish!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even going as far as granting you your trivial wish!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even going as far as granting you your trivial wish!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* No matter. We can still take it away from you. All that is required is quickly absorbing the impurity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* No matter. We can still take it away from you. All that is required is quickly absorbing the impurity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* No matter. We can still take it away from you. All that is required is quickly absorbing the impurity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't let you do that, C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't let you do that, C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't let you do that, C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just because you have my father's memories and look like him, you can never become Ravi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just because you have my father's memories and look like him, you can never become Ravi.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just because you have my father's memories and look like him, you can never become Ravi.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those memories aren't real in the first place. All you have done is gathered bits and stitched them together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those memories aren't real in the first place. All you have done is gathered bits and stitched them together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those memories aren't real in the first place. All you have done is gathered bits and stitched them together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am Ravi. Even if...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am Ravi. Even if...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am Ravi. Even if...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have not absorbed his body and memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have not absorbed his body and memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have not absorbed his body and memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because he became a flame and burned everything, just like the name he was given.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because he became a flame and burned everything, just like the name he was given.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because he became a flame and burned everything, just like the name he was given.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, it's natural that you had no interest in Asha's existence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, it's natural that you had no interest in Asha's existence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, it's natural that you had no interest in Asha's existence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You cannot deceive Asha with that crudely made body and memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You cannot deceive Asha with that crudely made body and memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You cannot deceive Asha with that crudely made body and memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet... there are still plenty of opportunities left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet... there are still plenty of opportunities left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet... there are still plenty of opportunities left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For you all cannot escape this place!
records.m_Talk_DEU: For you all cannot escape this place!
records.m_Talk_FRA: For you all cannot escape this place!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is a mission I must complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is a mission I must complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is a mission I must complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever the cost, I must get it done.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever the cost, I must get it done.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever the cost, I must get it done.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To purify the evil, I must move on even if it means losing everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To purify the evil, I must move on even if it means losing everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To purify the evil, I must move on even if it means losing everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will purify you from the drenches of your twisted thoughts, and get up once again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will purify you from the drenches of your twisted thoughts, and get up once again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will purify you from the drenches of your twisted thoughts, and get up once again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He disappeared...
records.m_Talk_DEU: He disappeared...
records.m_Talk_FRA: He disappeared...

records.m_Talk_ENG: He won't give up that easily. I'm sure he has another trick up his sleeve.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He won't give up that easily. I'm sure he has another trick up his sleeve.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He won't give up that easily. I'm sure he has another trick up his sleeve.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's that sound...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's that sound...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's that sound...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The coordinates are stabilizing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The coordinates are stabilizing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The coordinates are stabilizing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There must be a reason to stay in the Normalside long enough to even risk the coordinates from stabilizing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There must be a reason to stay in the Normalside long enough to even risk the coordinates from stabilizing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There must be a reason to stay in the Normalside long enough to even risk the coordinates from stabilizing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This has never happened before...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This has never happened before...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This has never happened before...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's Miss Aditya...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's Miss Aditya...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's Miss Aditya...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The whale is after her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The whale is after her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The whale is after her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's staying in the Normalside so it can swallow her too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's staying in the Normalside so it can swallow her too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's staying in the Normalside so it can swallow her too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Aditya...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Aditya...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Aditya...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, Miss Aditya even appears in the C.O.'s memories too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, Miss Aditya even appears in the C.O.'s memories too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, Miss Aditya even appears in the C.O.'s memories too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I should've caught wind of this a long time ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I should've caught wind of this a long time ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I should've caught wind of this a long time ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew she was older than me, but... I didn't know she was involved in such a big incident.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew she was older than me, but... I didn't know she was involved in such a big incident.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew she was older than me, but... I didn't know she was involved in such a big incident.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... if it's an incident where an entire city of people suddenly disappeared without a trace...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... if it's an incident where an entire city of people suddenly disappeared without a trace...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... if it's an incident where an entire city of people suddenly disappeared without a trace...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, is what I'm seeing right now the scene of the <color=#ffd34c>Great Gyre</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, is what I'm seeing right now the scene of the <color=#ffd34c>Great Gyre</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, is what I'm seeing right now the scene of the <color=#ffd34c>Great Gyre</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The... Great Gyre?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The... Great Gyre?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The... Great Gyre?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes! It's a mysterious incident where an entire city of people just vanished one day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes! It's a mysterious incident where an entire city of people just vanished one day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes! It's a mysterious incident where an entire city of people just vanished one day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some people call it rapture. Others say it's an alien kidnapping, or a simple Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some people call it rapture. Others say it's an alien kidnapping, or a simple Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some people call it rapture. Others say it's an alien kidnapping, or a simple Counterside Effect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was one of the biggest mysteries since the advent of the Administration... I never thought I'd be in this historical moment...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was one of the biggest mysteries since the advent of the Administration... I never thought I'd be in this historical moment...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was one of the biggest mysteries since the advent of the Administration... I never thought I'd be in this historical moment...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh, ahem!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh, ahem!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh, ahem!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. I got carried away again...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. I got carried away again...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. I got carried away again...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. So, that's what they call it out there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. So, that's what they call it out there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. So, that's what they call it out there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Aditya...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Aditya...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Aditya...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it... I knew you'd come...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it... I knew you'd come...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it... I knew you'd come...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must hurry. Our chance is now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must hurry. Our chance is now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must hurry. Our chance is now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! W-where are we going?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! W-where are we going?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! W-where are we going?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: To one of my plans to successfully complete my mission...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To one of my plans to successfully complete my mission...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To one of my plans to successfully complete my mission...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're going to retrieve <color=#ffd34c>Nagapasha</color>, the coordinate adjustment Artifact!
